Fello (Electron ACP Client)

Runtime
- Main process: src/electron/main.ts
- Preload (contextBridge): src/electron/preload.ts
- Backend Logic (Node.js): src/backend/ (includes IPC handlers, ACP bridge, terminal manager, WebUI server)
- Renderer (React + Vite): src/mainview/

IPC
- Typed contracts: src/shared/schema.ts
- Renderer API wrapper: src/mainview/backend.ts (uses window.fello or WebSocket fallback for WebUI)
- Electron-only native API: src/mainview/electron.ts (safely wraps window.fello calls)

Sessions & Persistence
- Session metadata persistence: src/backend/storage.ts (stores SessionInfo including models, modes, and initializeInfo)
- Fine-grained session updates: Uses `session-changed` IPC event to update single sessions atomically in the frontend store
- MCP Server support allows dynamic capability extension via Model Context Protocol servers
- Message history is intercepted by the backend and persisted locally in messages.jsonl files within each session's directory, enabling robust offline recovery without depending on the ACP server to hold history
- Renderer state store: src/mainview/store.ts
- Routing: src/mainview/router.tsx (uses react-router-dom HashRouter)
- ChatMessage polymorphic interface: src/mainview/chat-message.ts (supports ContentBlocks for text, image, audio, etc.)
- Content block rendering: src/mainview/components/content-blocks/
- Common Components: src/mainview/components/common/ (CodeView, CodeCompareView powered by react-diff-viewer-continued & shiki, ImageView, ReadonlyTerminal)
- ACP events handling: src/mainview/lib/session-state-reducer.ts
- Chat input attachments (staged): src/mainview/components/chat/chat-input.tsx (supports file picker + drag-and-drop; filters by agent promptCapabilities)
- Chat timeline dots + scroll tracking: src/mainview/components/chat/chat-area.tsx and src/mainview/components/chat/chat-timeline.tsx

Dev / Build Commands
- npm run dev (electron-vite dev; Vite server on http://localhost:5173)
- npm run build
- npm run preview
- npm run lint
- npm run typecheck
- npm run format

Repo Conventions
- Electron code lives under src/electron
- Backend logic lives under src/backend
- UI code lives under src/mainview
- ScrollArea utility: src/mainview/components/ui/scroll-area.tsx (supports hideScrollBar to omit scrollbar rendering)
